issues.description: Wrong trigger: DSL uses 'OnAttack' but the effect triggers when opponent's Character is returned to hand by your effect, not when attacking
Wrong action type: DSL uses 'SearchDeck' with destination 'hand', but the effect should look at top 3 cards and reorder them on top/bottom of deck, not add to hand
Missing condition: Effect has '[Your Turn]' timing restriction which should be duration 'DuringYourTurn'
Missing condition: Effect has '[Once Per Turn]' restriction which is not present in DSL
Missing filter specification: Effect should only trigger when opponent's Character is returned to hand by your effect
